sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61703" key="lakata/ratos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾱκατάρᾱτος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰρ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n61703.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κατάρατος</ref> </xr> with intens. prefix <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">λᾱ</itype>-, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> (<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">λακκ</itype>- cod.).</sense> </entryFree>
